capabilities.intent: List message templates for the authenticated user's customer and profile via JWT claims
capabilities.business_value: Users can retrieve pre-defined templates scoped to their profile before composing a message
flow: GetTemplatesHandler.Handle reads ProfileId + CustomerId from ICurrentUser JWT claims (evidence: GreenAi.Api/Features/Templates/GetTemplates/GetTemplatesHandler.cs:21)
constraints: ProfileId from JWT — immutable, no DB-based profile switching
rules: ICurrentUser (JWT claims) — no DB identity lookup

capabilities.intent: Retrieve a single message template by ID, scoped to the authenticated customer AND profile (access guard)
capabilities.business_value: Allows fetching a specific template for use in SendDirect (TemplateId parameter) — profile access check prevents cross-profile template access
flow: MessageTemplateRepository.GetByIdAsync called with id, customerId, AND profileId (evidence: GreenAi.Api/Features/Templates/MessageTemplateRepository.cs:24)
SQL JOIN MessageTemplateProfileAccess enforces profile ownership before returning (evidence: GreenAi.Api/Features/Templates/GetTemplateById.sql:1)
Returns MessageTemplateDto or null (null = template not found, wrong customer, or profile has no access)
constraints: CustomerId isolation — WHERE Id=@Id AND CustomerId=@CustomerId
ProfileId access gate — INNER JOIN MessageTemplateProfileAccess
rules: Channel consistency enforced by SendDirectHandler: template.Channel MUST match command.Channel — INVALID_TEMPLATE_CHANNEL if mismatch
